opening_line: I walked to the elevator. It used to be thirty steps from my door. I counted ninety-seven. The hallway is longer. My neighbors won't open their doors.
notes_for_player: CAM 04 — vanishing point beyond spec. Isolate floor.

questions.label: Ask location
questions.response: Fourth floor main corridor. East wing. All the doors look correct. The distance is wrong.

questions.label: Ask appearance
questions.response: No one in the hall. Just... more hall than there should be.

questions.label: Ask timeline
questions.response: Tonight. Maybe yesterday too. I thought I was tired.

questions.label: Request camera check
questions.response: Measure it on your screen. You have blueprints. Compare.
